title: Voice Persona AI
description: Hero title slide — Week 3 badge, 5 feature pills, key stats in footer (7 tabs, 50+ languages, 15s clone).

title: The Problem
description: Three core pain points: voiceover editing time, language barriers killing real moments, and generic AI voices losing brand identity.

title: The Solution
description: Four superpowers in a 2x2 grid: Voice Studio + Creator, Travel Talk (50+ langs), Live Interpreter, Two-Way Talk Room.

title: Studio + Creator Mode
description: Four feature cards: ElevenLabs voice clone (15s), AI Reel Generator (4 formats), Emotion Engine (4 emotions), Waveform + SRT export.

title: Travel Talk
description: 50+ languages, 4 modes (Speak/Listen/Live/Type), Camera OCR, Memory sessions, script mismatch detection, Azure OpenAI pipeline.

title: Interpreter + Talk
description: Week 3 hero — two panels: Live Interpreter (1-to-many simultaneous with Speak cards) and Two-Way Talk Room (QR share, bilingual transcript).

title: Week 3 + Tech Stack
description: Left: 5 Week 3 deliverables (Talk rooms, script mismatch, keyboard hints, 50+ languages, modal pickers). Right: full tech stack with color-coded rows.

title: Try It Now
description: Closing — live URL, 5 stats: 50+ languages, 7 tabs, 3 persona modes, 15s clone, 4 emotions. Tagline: Your Voice. Any Language. Infinite Personas.
